en: And the biggest, grossest, gnarliest rat I've ever seen in my life, eating the dog food, but it was funny because it was eating the dog food like...
ko: 내 인생에서 본 가장 크고, 가장 역겹고, 가장 징그러운 쥐가 개 사료를 먹고 있었는데, 재밌는 건 이렇게 먹고 있었어...

en: I ran after this rat, like, I don't know what I was going to do if I caught it, but you know, you stupid rat.
ko: 이 쥐를 쫓아갔는데, 잡으면 뭘 할지 모르겠지만, 이 멍청한 쥐야.

en: Demi, name three ways you can make Camp Rock R-rated.
ko: Demi, Camp Rock을 R등급으로 만들 수 있는 방법 세 가지 대봐.

en: Demi, name three nicknames for a woman's private parts.
ko: Demi, 여자 은밀한 부위 별명 세 가지 대봐.

en: Oh my god, um, coochie. No, I'm sorry.
The reward for me is all in the work, and the reward for me is all in just it being something that moves you.
ko: 나에게 보상은 작업 자체에 있고, 감동을 주는 무언가가 되는 것에 있어.

en: That's what's most important to me.
Um, who'd you share your first kiss with?
I think his name was Austin, I was at camp.
